title: Polycarp to Philippians and Martyrdom of Polycarp
text: # Polycarp to Philippians and Martyrdom of Polycarp — Simple Version

title: Polycarp to Philippians and Martyrdom of Polycarp
text: Polycarp to the Philippians and Martyrdom - Simple English Version

title: Polycarp to Philippians and Martyrdom of Polycarp
text: Polycarp encourages the Philippians to live in faith, love, and good works, following the example of Christ and the apostles. The Martyrdom account describes how the elderly bishop was arrested and burned at the stake for refusing to deny Christ, showing remarkable courage and prayer.
